title: AEGIS - Regulatory Surveillance Platform
tagline: Multi-agent autonomous system for automated regulatory compliance and corporate governance at a Fortune 50 Conglomerate
problem: A Fortune 50 Conglomerate's Secretarial and Legal departments faced critical bottlenecks in regulatory compliance, manual disclosure cycles, and insider trading tracking across 3.9M+ investor records.
solution: Architected AEGIS, a centralized multi-agent platform featuring Regulatory Intelligence Agents, a Directors Disclosure Module, and an AI Minutes Generator powered by Groq LLM.

architecture.security: Azure AD SSO + RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)

decisions.rationale: Ensured 100% accuracy for standard regulatory queries while allowing flexibility for complex intent.
